auth.prompt_message: Log in with Face ID / Touch ID / Biometrics
auth.switch_to_signup: Don't have an account? Sign Up
auth.switch_to_login: Already have an account? Log In

privacy.hero_text: ArogyaAI follows international standards like GDPR and HIPAA to ensure your health information stays private, encrypted, and under your control.
privacy.encryption_text:
• All data is encrypted at rest and in transit.
• No third-party analytics — ArogyaAI never sells or shares your data.
• Local storage mode ensures your insights remain on-device.
privacy.consent_text: Manage what ArogyaAI can analyze under Settings → Privacy Hub. Opt in/out for AI modules and delete records any time.
privacy.transparency_text: Every AI suggestion includes “why” reasoning and a traceable audit log so you can see exactly how recommendations were formed.
privacy.tips_text:
🔐 Review your privacy settings monthly.
📄 Export data any time for medical consultations.
🧭 Check the “Ethics Center” in More Features for ArogyaAI’s Ethical Charter.

home.intro_text: I’m ArogyaAI. Your smart health companion.
home.track_symptoms_desc: Log and track your health symptoms, get instant AI feedback.
home.chat_desc: Ask any health question, anytime — powered by world-class AI.
home.imaging_desc: Upload and enhance scans, X-rays, and more with AI.
home.calendar_desc: Set reminders for medicine, checkups, and daily health tasks.
home.skin_desc: Detect and monitor skin cancer risks with AI.

language.footer_text: You can change language anytime in Settings.

hero_text: Paste or upload reports and ArogyaAI translates them into plain language insights — highlighting which values are high, low, or within range.
core_features_text:
• Detects common markers (HbA1c, LDL, CRP, ALT etc.) automatically.
• Stores each result to build time-based trend charts.
• Provides AI-generated context and gentle lifestyle suggestions.
data_flow_text: The text you paste is parsed securely on-device. Numeric values are extracted using pattern recognition and mapped to health domains (glucose, lipids, renal etc.).
benefits_text:
✅ Saves time decoding complex medical terminology.
📊 Visualizes progress with color-coded charts.
🧠 Educates users without medical jargon.
tip_text: Enter clear text values (e.g., “LDL 145 mg/dL”) for best accuracy. ArogyaAI does not diagnose — always verify with your clinician.

tutorial_home.hero_text: The ArogyaAI Home Dashboard is your personalized wellness command center — combining insights, reminders, and progress in one glance.
tutorial_home.what_text:
• Displays your daily health score, key vitals, and activity summaries.
• Integrates AI notifications like “hydration reminder” or “immune risk check.”
• Summarizes your latest lab interpretations and chronic-care metrics.
tutorial_home.how_text: The dashboard aggregates inputs from sensors, lab reports, and your manual entries. ArogyaAI’s adaptive engine then ranks what matters most today.
tutorial_home.tips_text:
✅ Tap any card (Heart, Nutrition, Mind, Sleep) to view detailed analytics.
🌙 Night Mode saves battery and enhances clarity.
🔔 Set custom alerts under Settings → Notifications.

global.hero_title: See Health Through a Global Lens
global.hero_desc: ArogyaAI connects world data to bring real-time insights about disease outbreaks, air quality, and healthcare access — empowering users and communities worldwide.
global.trends_desc:
Explore continuously updated dashboards of worldwide health statistics. ArogyaAI aggregates WHO, CDC, and Johns Hopkins data into easy visual charts showing:

• Vaccination progress by region
• Disease incidence comparisons
• Nutrition and clean water access
• AI-estimated well-being scores based on multi-country metrics
global.outbreak_desc:
A dynamic map layer visualizes current disease outbreaks across the world. Each location includes verified sources and response levels.

AI-generated overlays help identify emerging clusters or containment progress in near real-time.

Zoom into your region to see local risk updates, vaccination drives, and hospital readiness.
global.risk_desc:
Stay informed of travel or health alerts anywhere on the planet.

Alerts include climate impacts, epidemic notices, pollution levels, and humanitarian advisories — powered by global AI scanning 1M+ data points daily.

You can filter alerts by topic or region to personalize your global safety feed.
global.equity_desc:
This initiative helps visualize disparities in access to care, vaccines, and nutrition. ArogyaAI’s models use satellite imagery, open datasets, and anonymized health surveys to identify areas needing urgent attention.

Goal: help policymakers and communities make data-driven decisions for equitable health worldwide.
global.try_desc: Open the live toolset and explore global data interactively.
global.footer_text: ArogyaAI Science Society · Empowering Global Well-Being 🌎

support.hero_desc: Learn how to get the most out of ArogyaAI’s tools, find answers, and explore guided tutorials to master your health assistant.
support.label: Ask ArogyaAI Support
support.placeholder: Type your question (e.g., How do I add a family member?)

support.tutorial_home_desc: Understand your AI assistant, daily health overview, and personalized alerts.
support.tutorial_privacy_desc: Learn how ArogyaAI protects your information and ensures compliance with privacy laws.
support.tutorial_labs_desc: Upload or paste reports for instant AI-powered insights and health summaries.
support.tutorial_global_desc: Explore worldwide health trends, outbreak maps, and real-time safety insights.
support.feature_ai_desc: Chat with our medical-grade AI to understand symptoms, lab trends, or wellness goals.
support.feature_family_desc: Add loved ones and manage shared health profiles seamlessly.
support.feature_immune_desc: Predict immune risk using cutting-edge multi-modal models developed by ArogyaAI Labs.
support.feature_chronic_desc: Monitor diabetes, hypertension, and long-term conditions with adaptive care plans.

record_import.privacy_desc: Your records are encrypted and never shared without your consent.

pediatric.ribbon: Gentle guidance for kids — and their heroes.
pediatric.disclaimer: Not a diagnosis. Seek urgent care for severe symptoms, breathing difficulty, dehydration, injury, or parental concern.
pediatric.milestone_helper: Get play ideas and language prompts tailored to {{ageLabel}}.
pediatric.parentkit_helper: Sleepless night? Tough day? Ask ArogyaAI for compassionate, evidence-informed calming tips.
pediatric.safety_notice: ArogyaAI offers supportive guidance only. If you’re worried, trust your instincts and contact a clinician or emergency services.

nutrition.scan_desc: Use your camera to instantly detect meal calories and nutrition facts.
nutrition.tip_text: A mix of fiber-rich foods, colorful vegetables, and omega-3 fats can stabilize energy and mood throughout the day.
nutrition.input_required_msg: Please describe your goal or meal preference first.
nutrition.input_required_diet: Please describe your diet goals or calorie target.

mental.default_reply: I'm here to listen. Tell me more about what’s on your mind.
mental.error_message: Hmm, I’m having trouble connecting right now, but you’re not alone. Try again soon 💙

hero_desc: ArogyaAI monitors worldwide health patterns to protect lives using AI, data, and compassion.
who_desc: Up-to-date global disease burden, mortality, and prevention metrics.
alerts_desc: AI forecasts disease spread using mobility, climate, and environmental data.
prevention_desc: Region-specific vaccination, nutrition, and lifestyle guidance.
ai_connection_error: ⚠️ Could not connect to ArogyaAI backend. Make sure Flask (port 5003) is running.
How did it feel? RPE, route, focus…: How did it feel? RPE, route, focus…
Get personalized recovery, mobility, and: Get personalized recovery, mobility, and training suggestions based on your recent logs.

ethics.hero_title: Built on Trust, Guided by Ethics
ethics.hero_desc: ArogyaAI follows human-centered AI principles—safety, transparency, and user control.
ethics.section1_desc: Understand how ArogyaAI’s models interpret data, make predictions, and self-correct biases.
ethics.section2_desc: You decide what data is stored, shared, or erased. Manage granular permissions anytime.
ethics.section3_desc: Access, rectify, or delete your personal health data. You have full ownership of your information.
ethics.section4_desc: View detailed logs of all AI recommendations and human override events for complete transparency.
ethics.promise_text: Every prediction and insight is designed to heal, not to harm. Your privacy is sacred. Your trust is our foundation. 💙

ethics_detail.section1_detail:
ArogyaAI provides model interpretability and explainability using global feature importance, confidence levels, and traceable data paths.

Every AI suggestion includes “why” reasoning, visible audit trails, and optional community-reviewed summaries. This ensures both accountability and user education.
ethics_detail.section2_detail:
You’re always in control of your information. You can opt in or out of AI modules, delete records, or anonymize stored data.

Consent preferences can be changed anytime under Settings → Privacy Controls. ArogyaAI never shares personal data without explicit permission.
ethics_detail.section3_detail:
As a user, you have the right to access, correct, export, or erase your data.

ArogyaAI complies with international frameworks such as GDPR and HIPAA, ensuring that all requests are honored quickly and securely.
ethics_detail.section4_detail:
All AI predictions, corrections, and manual overrides are logged in a secure audit ledger.

This transparency ensures fairness, builds trust, and helps regulators and researchers understand how ArogyaAI learns over time.

skin_cancer_screen.title: Skin Cancer Analyzer
skin_cancer_screen.error_message: Failed to upload or connect to server.
skin_cancer_screen.warning_text: Warning: This result may be cancerous. Please consult a dermatologist as soon as possible.
skin_cancer_screen.benign_text: This result is usually benign, but consult a doctor for changes or concerns.

labels.bkl_desc: Non-cancerous, wart or seborrheic keratosis–like growth. Usually harmless.
labels.nv_desc: A common mole. Generally benign, but monitor for changes.
labels.df_desc: A benign, fibrous skin nodule. Not dangerous.
labels.mel_desc: The most dangerous skin cancer. Seek a dermatologist immediately.
labels.bcc_desc: A common, slow-growing skin cancer. See a dermatologist.
labels.akiec_desc: Precancerous or early-stage cancer spot. Get medical advice.

Upload a chest X-ray, and see it enhanced by our advanced AI model—built with real medical super-resolution deep learning.
(HIPAA-safe: images are processed locally or in a secure private cloud.)
imaging.aiEnhancementMessage: Your X-ray will be enhanced by our advanced AI model for clarity. Proceed?
imaging.invalidEnhanced: AI did not return a valid enhanced image.
imaging.serverFail: Failed to connect to the AI server.

prompt.chief: Briefly describe your main symptom or concern.

triage_message.emergency: ⚠️ Potential red flags detected. Seek emergency care now.
triage_message.urgent: We recommend urgent evaluation within 24 hours.
triage_message.routine: ✅ No emergencies detected. Monitor symptoms and follow advice.

fever_infection.q1: Do you currently have a fever or chills?
fever_infection.q4: Do you have body aches or fatigue?
fever_infection.q6: Have you recently traveled or met sick contacts?
fever_infection.q7: Are you vaccinated for flu or COVID?

chest_pain.q1: Describe the pain: sharp, dull, or pressure-like?
chest_pain.q2: Does it radiate to your arm, neck, or jaw?
chest_pain.q3: How long have you had it?
chest_pain.q5: Any shortness of breath or dizziness?
chest_pain.q6: Do you have history of heart or lung disease?
chest_pain.q7: Did it occur with exertion or at rest?

headache_neuro.q2: When did it start and how severe is it?
headache_neuro.q3: Do you have nausea or vomiting?
headache_neuro.q4: Any vision changes, weakness, or numbness?
headache_neuro.q5: Is this similar to prior headaches?
headache_neuro.q6: Have you had fever, stiff neck, or trauma?

anxiety_mood.q1: How often do you feel anxious or low?
anxiety_mood.q2: Do you have trouble sleeping or concentrating?
anxiety_mood.q3: Any panic attacks, nightmares, or flashbacks?
anxiety_mood.q4: Do you feel hopeless or worthless?
anxiety_mood.q5: Do you have thoughts of self-harm or suicide?
anxiety_mood.q6: Are you getting social or family support?

abdominal_gi.q1: Where exactly is your abdominal pain?
abdominal_gi.q2: When did it begin and what triggers it?
abdominal_gi.q3: Do you feel nausea, vomiting, or bloating?
abdominal_gi.q5: Any blood in stool or vomit?
abdominal_gi.q6: Does eating worsen or relieve it?

msk_pain.q1: Which joint or muscle hurts most?
msk_pain.q2: Did it start suddenly or after an injury?
msk_pain.q4: Is there swelling, redness, or stiffness?
msk_pain.q5: Have you had fever or fatigue?
msk_pain.q6: Have you experienced similar pain before?

rash_skin.q2: What does it look like (itchy, red, blistering)?
rash_skin.q3: When did you first notice it?
rash_skin.q4: Did you use new soaps, lotions, or meds?
rash_skin.q5: Has it spread or changed in color?
rash_skin.q6: Are you having fever, swelling, or pain?

shortness_breath.q1: When did you start feeling breathless?
shortness_breath.q2: Does it occur at rest or with exertion?
shortness_breath.q3: Any cough, wheezing, or chest tightness?
shortness_breath.q4: Do you have swelling in legs or feet?
shortness_breath.q5: Have you been exposed to smoke or pollution?

pregnancy.q1: Are you pregnant or suspect pregnancy?
pregnancy.q2: When was your last menstrual period?
pregnancy.q4: Any abdominal pain or vaginal bleeding?
pregnancy.q6: Have you had prior pregnancies or complications?

diabetes.q2: How are your sugar readings recently?
diabetes.q5: Are you taking insulin or tablets regularly?

trauma.q4: Are you bleeding or have deformity?
trauma.q5: Did you lose consciousness or memory?

allergy.q2: When was your last allergic reaction?
allergy.q3: Did you experience swelling or shortness of breath?
allergy.q4: Do you carry an epinephrine pen?

uti.q1: Do you have pain or burning while urinating?
uti.q3: Is the urine cloudy or foul-smelling?
uti.q4: Any blood in urine or flank pain?
uti.q5: Do you have fever or chills?

thyroid.q1: Do you feel unusually tired or energetic?
thyroid.q2: Any changes in weight or appetite?
thyroid.q4: Do you feel cold or hot intolerance?
thyroid.q5: Have you had thyroid tests done before?

pediatrics.q2: Are they feeding and sleeping normally?

elderly.q1: What is the person’s age and mobility status?
elderly.q3: Are they eating and drinking well?
elderly.q4: Any chronic diseases like diabetes or heart problems?
elderly.q5: Are medications being taken as prescribed?

cancer.q1: What type of cancer are you concerned about?
cancer.q2: Have you noticed a lump, pain, or bleeding?
cancer.q3: Any unexplained weight loss or fatigue?
cancer.q4: Are you undergoing chemo or radiation?
cancer.q5: When was your last oncology follow-up?

covid_long.q1: When did you have COVID-19 infection?
covid_long.q2: Do you still have fatigue, cough, or brain fog?
covid_long.q4: Have you returned to work or school?

nutrition.q2: Do you eat fruits and vegetables?
nutrition.q3: Do you take supplements or vitamins?
nutrition.q5: Do you drink enough water daily?

exercise.q1: How often do you exercise per week?
exercise.q2: What type of physical activity do you do?
exercise.q4: Do you stretch or warm up?
exercise.q5: Do you feel fatigued after exercise?

assistantSummary.savedMessage: Your health summary has been added to your Health Passport.
assistantSummary.errorMessage: Could not save your health summary.
assistantSummary.emergencyAdvice: Please go to the nearest emergency department or call local emergency services.
assistantSummary.urgentAdvice: Seek care within the next 24 hours for medical evaluation.
assistantSummary.routineAdvice: Monitor your symptoms and follow general wellness guidance.

Fever usually signals the body’s immune: Fever usually signals the body’s immune response to an infection.
Stay hydrated and rest; avoid over-exert: Stay hydrated and rest; avoid over-exertion.
If fever persists beyond 3 days, or is a: If fever persists beyond 3 days, or is above 103°F (39.4°C), seek medical care.
Antipyretics such as acetaminophen or ib: Antipyretics such as acetaminophen or ibuprofen may help lower temperature.
Chest pain can have cardiac, pulmonary,: Chest pain can have cardiac, pulmonary, or musculoskeletal causes.
Pain spreading to the arm, neck, or jaw: Pain spreading to the arm, neck, or jaw suggests possible heart involvement.
If pain occurs with exertion, sweating,: If pain occurs with exertion, sweating, or shortness of breath — treat as emergency.
Avoid exertion and seek ECG evaluation i: Avoid exertion and seek ECG evaluation immediately if severe.
Shortness of breath may arise from asthm: Shortness of breath may arise from asthma, infection, heart failure, or anxiety.
Note when symptoms occur — during rest o: Note when symptoms occur — during rest or activity — to help diagnosis.
If you cannot speak full sentences or no: If you cannot speak full sentences or notice blue lips, seek emergency help.
Anxiety and mood disorders are common an: Anxiety and mood disorders are common and treatable.
Breathing exercises and mindfulness can: Breathing exercises and mindfulness can reduce short-term symptoms.
Persistent sadness or suicidal thoughts: Persistent sadness or suicidal thoughts warrant immediate professional help.
Cognitive-behavioral therapy and medicat: Cognitive-behavioral therapy and medications can be highly effective.
Headaches often result from tension, mig: Headaches often result from tension, migraine, or dehydration.
Sudden severe headache with vision chang: Sudden severe headache with vision change or weakness requires emergency care.
Adequate hydration, sleep, and stress co: Adequate hydration, sleep, and stress control may reduce recurrence.
Abdominal pain may indicate gastritis, i: Abdominal pain may indicate gastritis, infection, or intestinal inflammation.
Pain after meals may suggest reflux or u: Pain after meals may suggest reflux or ulcer.
Seek urgent care if pain is severe, pers: Seek urgent care if pain is severe, persistent, or associated with vomiting blood.
Skin rashes can result from infection, a: Skin rashes can result from infection, allergy, or autoimmune causes.
Track triggers such as new soaps, foods,: Track triggers such as new soaps, foods, or medications.
Apply mild moisturizers; avoid scratchin: Apply mild moisturizers; avoid scratching to prevent infection.
Maintain fasting glucose between 80–130: Maintain fasting glucose between 80–130 mg/dL and HbA1c <7%.
Regular exercise and balanced diet stabi: Regular exercise and balanced diet stabilize blood sugar.
Report frequent hypoglycemia or blurred: Report frequent hypoglycemia or blurred vision to your clinician.
Thyroid imbalance can alter metabolism a: Thyroid imbalance can alter metabolism and energy levels.
Fatigue, weight change, and intolerance: Fatigue, weight change, and intolerance to heat/cold are key clues.
TSH and T4 tests confirm diagnosis; medi: TSH and T4 tests confirm diagnosis; medication adjustment may be needed.
Regular prenatal visits are vital for ma: Regular prenatal visits are vital for maternal and fetal health.
Eat balanced meals with folic acid, iron: Eat balanced meals with folic acid, iron, and calcium supplements.
Report abdominal pain or bleeding to you: Report abdominal pain or bleeding to your obstetrician promptly.
Muscle or joint pain often follows strai: Muscle or joint pain often follows strain, poor posture, or arthritis.
Rest, gentle stretching, and anti-inflam: Rest, gentle stretching, and anti-inflammatory medication can help.
Seek imaging if pain persists >2 weeks o: Seek imaging if pain persists >2 weeks or after trauma.
Urinary tract infections are common, esp: Urinary tract infections are common, especially in women.
Drink plenty of fluids and avoid holding: Drink plenty of fluids and avoid holding urine.
Antibiotics are usually required; finish: Antibiotics are usually required; finish the prescribed course.
Allergies are immune over-reactions to h: Allergies are immune over-reactions to harmless substances.
Avoid known triggers and use antihistami: Avoid known triggers and use antihistamines as needed.
Severe reactions with throat swelling ne: Severe reactions with throat swelling need immediate epinephrine and ER care.
Post-COVID fatigue and brain fog may las: Post-COVID fatigue and brain fog may last weeks to months.
Gradual exercise and consistent sleep ai: Gradual exercise and consistent sleep aid recovery.
Seek evaluation if new chest pain or pal: Seek evaluation if new chest pain or palpitations develop.
Assess for bleeding, deformity, or loss: Assess for bleeding, deformity, or loss of consciousness.
Immobilize injured limbs and apply press: Immobilize injured limbs and apply pressure to control bleeding.
Unexplained weight loss, fatigue, or lum: Unexplained weight loss, fatigue, or lumps should be evaluated promptly.
Early detection greatly improves treatme: Early detection greatly improves treatment outcomes.
Follow oncology appointments and report: Follow oncology appointments and report new symptoms.
Monitor growth, feeding, and development: Monitor growth, feeding, and developmental milestones.
Persistent fever, dehydration, or lethar: Persistent fever, dehydration, or lethargy require pediatric assessment.
Older adults are prone to falls, medicat: Older adults are prone to falls, medication interactions, and dehydration.
Regular check-ups and medication review: Regular check-ups and medication review prevent complications.
Encourage physical activity and social e: Encourage physical activity and social engagement.
A balanced diet supports immune and meta: A balanced diet supports immune and metabolic health.
Include fruits, vegetables, whole grains: Include fruits, vegetables, whole grains, lean proteins, and adequate hydration.
Limit processed foods and excess sugar.
Regular moderate exercise improves cardi: Regular moderate exercise improves cardiovascular and mental health.
Warm-up and cool-down reduce injury risk: Warm-up and cool-down reduce injury risk.
Start slow if new to exercise; consisten: Start slow if new to exercise; consistency matters more than intensity.
Adults need 7–9 hours of sleep per night: Adults need 7–9 hours of sleep per night.
Avoid caffeine, heavy meals, and screens: Avoid caffeine, heavy meals, and screens before bed.
If snoring or pauses in breathing occur,: If snoring or pauses in breathing occur, screen for sleep apnea.
Chronic stress can raise blood pressure: Chronic stress can raise blood pressure and impair immunity.
Practice deep breathing, time management: Practice deep breathing, time management, and regular breaks.
If anxiety interferes with daily life, s: If anxiety interferes with daily life, seek counseling.
Keep blood pressure below 130/80 mmHg th: Keep blood pressure below 130/80 mmHg through lifestyle and medication.
Reduce salt, avoid tobacco, and exercise: Reduce salt, avoid tobacco, and exercise regularly.
Check BP at home weekly and log results: Check BP at home weekly and log results for your doctor.
Dehydration causes fatigue, dizziness, a: Dehydration causes fatigue, dizziness, and dark urine.
Increase water intake; include oral rehy: Increase water intake; include oral rehydration if severe.
Seek care if unable to keep fluids down: Seek care if unable to keep fluids down or confusion develops.
Continue monitoring symptoms and maintai: Continue monitoring symptoms and maintain a healthy lifestyle.
Seek care if symptoms worsen or new issu: Seek care if symptoms worsen or new issues appear.
👋 Hi, I’m ArogyaAI, your personal health:
👋 Hi, I’m ArogyaAI, your personal health companion. Ask me any health question — I can help explain conditions, lab results, treatments, and preventive care.

> Remember: I’m not a doctor and can’t assist in emergencies. If it’s urgent, please contact your healthcare provider or local emergency number.
I’m still learning, but I’ll do my best: I’m still learning, but I’ll do my best to help!
⚠️ I couldn’t connect to ArogyaAI right: ⚠️ I couldn’t connect to ArogyaAI right now. Try again later — I’ll be here for you.
academy.subtitle: Learn about your immune system. Answer to earn badges!
academy.correctMessage: You earned a badge for this question.
academy.q1.question: What is the main function of the immune system?
academy.q1.answer: To defend the body against harmful pathogens
academy.q1.choices.2: To defend the body against harmful pathogens
academy.q2.question: Which cells are known as the body's first line of defense?
